title: Mesmerizing Abstract 3D Geometric Art Horizontal Banner
sourceTitle: Mesmerizing Abstract 3D Geometric Art Horizontal Banner

imagePrompts.prompt: A mesmerizing abstract 3D geometric art horizontal banner, a dramatic composition of interconnected oversized geometric shapes floating in deep space, a massive perfect sphere with a mirror-polished liquid chrome surface reflecting a distorted rainbow spectrum, intersecting with a giant torus ring shape in translucent iridescent glass material refracting light into prismatic color explosions of electric pink cyan and gold, a sharp-edged crystalline pyramid emerging from the lower left in deep obsidian black with razor-thin neon teal glowing edges, dozens of smaller floating geometric fragments orbiting the main shapes like debris — cubes triangles and dodecahedrons each with their own unique material from matte clay to holographic foil, the background a deep cosmic black with an extremely subtle purple to midnight blue radial gradient, tiny floating light particles and lens flare bursts adding depth and energy, bold minimal white sans-serif typography at the bottom right reading "BEYOND FORM" with a tiny subtitle "Explore the infinite", ultra-premium 3D render quality with cinematic depth of field, 16:9 horizontal ratio
